beats.activity: Wake up, coffee, check ferry schedule and weather on the porch
beats.reasoning: Diego is routine-bound and obsessive about ferry schedules. A warm Friday morning on the Sound calls him outside with coffee before the day starts.

beats.activity: Drive to Mercer Island ferry terminal and board the ferry to Seattle
beats.reasoning: Diego takes the ferry obsessively and knows the schedule by heart. The breezy morning and glassy Sound make it a good ferry day.

beats.activity: Ferry ride across Puget Sound, watching the water and waking up
beats.reasoning: The ferry ride is part of Diego's routine and a quiet moment before the market rush. He values these calm transitions.

beats.activity: Walk from ferry terminal to Pike Place Market stall
beats.reasoning: Short walk from the ferry to his florist stall in Pike Place. Diego knows this route cold.

beats.activity: Work at florist stall: arranging flowers, helping customers, restocking
beats.reasoning: Friday morning at the market is busy. Warm weather brings foot traffic. Diego settles into his routine work rhythm.

beats.activity: Lunch break: sandwich and coffee in the back of the stall
beats.reasoning: Diego's daily ritual—lunch standing in the back, listening to the market hum. Frugal and routine-bound, he doesn't venture far.

beats.activity: Work at florist stall: afternoon arrangements, customer orders, closing prep
beats.reasoning: Friday afternoon stays busy. Diego closes early to catch the ferry. By 5pm, Pride street fair closures on Broadway and Pike will start, but his market stall is unaffected and he'll be heading out.

beats.activity: Walk from Pike Place to ferry terminal, avoiding Pride street fair crowds on Broadway
beats.reasoning: Diego deliberately leaves before the Pride street fair chaos peaks. He values quiet and routine over big crowds. Takes a route away from Broadway closures.

beats.activity: Ferry ride home, watching the evening light on the Sound
beats.reasoning: The golden hour ferry ride home is Diego's favorite. Warm, breezy day means the Sound will be beautiful. Another quiet transition before evening.

beats.activity: Drive home from ferry terminal and unpack groceries
beats.reasoning: Quick stop at the ferry terminal market or a quick grocery pickup on the way home. Diego keeps his errands efficient and close to routine.

beats.activity: Evening at home: vinyl record listening, bourbon, video gaming, wind down
beats.reasoning: Diego's perfect evening: time with his vinyl collection and video games. He's low-energy from yesterday (35/100), so a quiet night at home is exactly what he needs. Put on something mellow, a bourbon, and settle in.
A solid 8.5 hours of rest after a steady Friday. Diego ends his day as he always does, at home on Mercer Island.

world_event_prompt: Warm, breezy Friday, high of 77F. Seattle Pride kickoff: Capitol Hill street fair and road closures along Broadway and Pike from 5pm. Festive, busy evening downtown.
